hero.description: AgriVerify helps farmers verify agricultural dealers, check product authenticity, and report fraud — in your language, wherever you are.

features.heading: Everything farmers need
features.subheading: One platform to verify, discover, and report in your local language.

verify.title: Verify Dealers
verify.desc: Check license status and trust scores of agri-product dealers.

products.title: Find Products
products.desc: Scan barcodes or search to verify product authenticity.

report.title: Report Fraud
report.desc: File complaints against fake products or unlicensed dealers.

trust.title: Trust Scores
trust.desc: Community-driven ratings to protect Indian farmers.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

dealerSearch.title: Find Dealers
dealerSearch.desc: Search and verify licensed agricultural dealers near you.
dealerSearch.placeholder: Search by name, shop, or location...
dealerSearch.noDealers: No dealers found. Try a different search.

dealerProfile.reportDesc: Think this dealer is selling fake products or operating without a license?

productSearch.title: Product Verification
productSearch.desc: Search products by name, brand, or scan a barcode to verify authenticity.
productSearch.placeholder: Search by name, brand, or barcode...
productSearch.noProducts: No products found. Try scanning a barcode!
productSearch.notFound: Product not found for this barcode.

reportFiling.title: File a Report
reportFiling.desc: Report fraud, fake products, or unlicensed dealers. All reports are confidential.
reportFiling.descPlaceholder: Describe what happened in detail (at least 20 characters)...
reportFiling.successDesc: Thank you for helping protect farmers. Our team will review your report within 48 hours.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.desc: Manage reports, dealers, and platform trust scores.

components.mapTip: 💡 Integrate Leaflet or Google Maps for live map view
components.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Please enter barcode manually.

cta.title: Protect yourself from agri-fraud
cta.desc: File a report today — it takes less than 2 minutes.
